LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS LOUIS DAVID MANGIN, RICHARD PERRY PACK III, AND GRINSHOT, INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 AND 2 TO PLEAD HOW THE ALLEGEDLY FRAUDULENT STATEMENTS CAUSED ANY HARM TO PLAINTIFFS AND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3 TO PLEAD THE CONTRACT TERM ALLEGEDLY BREACHED AND HOW THAT BREACH CAUSED ANY HARM. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 4, 5 AND 6 BECAUSE PLAINTIFFS HAVE PLEADED NO BASIS FOR ANY SUCH DUTY, AND HAVE NOT OPPOSED THE DEMURRER AS TO THESE CLAIMS. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
